THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER, JOHN BOYCE II CONGAS, PHIL FRAZER, SETH SANKUS, AREL AKA AREL SAMKUS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1894 25TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $700.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMNT AGAINST DEFT JOHN TURNER BY STIP; JUDGMNT AGAINST DEFTS CONGAS, FRAZER AND SANKUS AKA SAMKUS PERSUANT TO ENTRY OF DEFAULT. DEFTS TO PAY $350 BY 6-10-96 & $350 BY 6-30-96. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS.
